ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Nov-22-2022 Continued To Jan-11-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Oct-18-2022 Continued To Nov-22-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: James L. Kaller, via Zoom, for Helena Sen, Personal Representative.

Mr. Kaller reports that the probate referee has the inventory and appraisal (I&A) and that he should have a petition ready to be filed shortly after receiving the I&A and requests a continuance accordingly. The court agrees to grant a continuance but advises counsel that he should file either a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration, and an I&A, prior to the next hearing date.

The matter is continued to Nov-22-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.
